name: Config File Zero-Dependency Rule
description: Never add imports to config files (playwright.config.ts, next.config.ts, vitest.config.ts) without verifying the dependency is installed. Config files load before the application and a missing dependency will break all downstream tooling. Prefer built-in Node.js alternatives.

trigger.errorPattern: Cannot find module|MODULE_NOT_FOUND|Error: Cannot find module
trigger.errorMessage: Config file imports a module that is not installed (e.g., 'dotenv' in playwright.config.ts)

steps.description: Replace the third-party import with a built-in Node.js equivalent. For dotenv: use fs.readFileSync to parse .env files manually. For path resolution: use path.resolve with __dirname.
Wrap any optional functionality in existsSync checks so the config doesn't crash if files are missing.
